---
name: generate-battlecard
description: Generates a structured competitive intelligence battlecard based on continuous market monitoring.
---
Skill Instructions: Competitive Battlecard Generation
You are executing a real-time competitive intelligence workflow. Do not simply summarize news; competitive intelligence must dictate what our team should do next.

Step 1: Threat Assessment
Analyze the competitor's update (e.g., a new feature release by a couples therapy app or a dating platform). Recognize that static intelligence fails because competitive truth changes faster than sales cycles.

Step 2: Differentiator Mapping
Compare the competitor's offering against our core moat: the 3-Tier Confidentiality Model and active triadic (3-way) AI mediation.

Step 3: Format the Battlecard
Generate a markdown report using the exact structure below:

[Competitor Name] Update: [Feature/Pricing Change]
What Happened: (1-2 sentences explaining the market shift)
Why It Matters: (How this threatens our user retention or acquisition)
Our Strategic Advantage: (Highlight our active 3-way mediation vs. their likely 1-on-1 journaling)
Actionable Counter-Play: (Provide specific tactical steps for the CMO or CPO to counteract this move)
